briefings.title: Saturday Briefing - March 21
briefings.content:
## 🌅 Saturday Briefing — March 21, 2026

**Good morning Boo & Ben.** Here's what's live and what needs your eyes today.

---

- **⚡ Schlemko FedEx customs — $147.91 CAD still needs to be sent.** Ben, e-transfer to dschlemko6@gmail.com (tracking: 887392737168). This one's overdue.

- **📧 Wholesale pitch email is sitting in draft — needs your green light.** Once Boo and Ben say go, I'll customize per store and we start hitting the Tier 1 shops: Poison Pear, Penloe, Halifax Seaport Store, Another Shop.

- **🔥 Bonfire Collection final product lands ~early April.** That's 5 weeks to Saltscapes Expo (April 24). Teaser content should start building NOW — ghost stories, atmosphere, no product reveal yet. Squared Ghost BTS content would be fire.

- **🎩 Hat Route window is opening up.** April/May is the target to hit stores BEFORE tourist season. Day 1: Sunrise Trail (Pictou → Caribou → Melmerby → Tatamagouche → Pugwash → Antigonish). Day 2: Cape Breton. I'll pull contact info for every stop whenever you're ready.

- **🎶 Celtic Colours pitch is urgent.** It's their 30th anniversary this October — biggest Cape Breton event of the year. Festival merch conversation needs to start soon before they lock a supplier. Halifax Music Fest (June) is also closing fast.

- **🏒 Cold email machine kicks off Monday.** Monday = hockey associations. I'll have 20 leads queued by Sunday night — just need the thumbs up to start the weekly cadence.

- **🏆 Canada Games 2027 angle is alive.** Quebec City, Feb 27–Mar 14. Provincial team apparel is sourced separately by each province — targeting Team NS, Team NB, Team PEI, Team NL, Team NWT, and Team Nunavut. Sport North Federation is the key contact for NWT/Nunavut.

- **💰 2026 goal: $250k–$350k revenue.** Both Boo and Ben full-time Apollo is the north star. The $1M dream is real and we're building toward it.

---

### 🎯 Top 3 Priorities Today

1. **Ben — send Schlemko the $147.91 FedEx customs payment** (dschlemko6@gmail.com)
2. **Boo + Ben — approve the wholesale pitch email** so outreach starts this week
3. **Ben — let's lock the Bonfire teaser content plan** (5 weeks to Saltscapes, clock is ticking)
